meta-runner.name: Generate IPS Report by subtasks
meta-runner.description: Depends on following TeamCity parameters: * RELENG_STANDARD_PARAMETERS * RELENG_EXTRA_PARAMETERS * RELENG_JVM_OPTS * RELENG_JDK_VERSION * RELENG_MAVEN_VERSION * env.BUILD_ENV Additional info: * Exactly one of the RELEASE_QUARTER, SINCE_YEAR, SINCE_LAST_DAYS parameters has to be specified

param.name: IPS
param.spec: text description='Name of IPS' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: RELEASE_QUARTER
param.spec: text description='Quarter of IPS release (example 2018.4)' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: SINCE_YEAR
param.spec: text description='The year in format yyyy. First day of the year will be used as lower bound for selection of the issues' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: SINCE_LAST_DAYS
param.spec: text description='The number of days to look back from the current date to select issues for the report' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: SYSTEM
param.spec: text description='System. Possible values are: CLASSIC, SIGMA' validationMode='not_empty' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT
param.spec: checkbox description='Generate custom report' uncheckedValue='false' checkedValue='true' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_TEMPLATE
param.spec: text description='Path to velocity template. Used only if CUSTOM_REPORT is enabled' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_FILE
param.spec: text description='Path to custom report file. Used only if CUSTOM_REPORT is enabled' validationMode='any' display='normal'

param.name: CUSTOM_REPORT_ESCAPE_HTML
param.spec: checkbox description='Escape HTML symbols in custom report. Used only if CUSTOM_REPORT is enabled' uncheckedValue='false' checkedValue='true' display='normal'

param.name: JSON_REPORT_FILE
param.spec: text description='Path to json report file' validationMode='not_empty' display='normal'

param.name: MANDATORY
param.spec: text description='Only mandatory issues' uncheckedValue='false' checkedValue='true' display='normal'
